subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to retrieve current month spend and 3-month rolling average by vendor/department. Calculate variance, deviation percentage, and percent difference from baseline. Return current_spend, avg_3m_spend, variance, pct_deviation.

Reconcile spend variance results with classification thresholds to assign each anomaly to normal_variance (<15%), concerning (15-40%), or critical (>40%) based on percent deviation. Include rationale and risk signals.

plan.cost_rationale: Plan uses 2 subtasks: (1) sql_gen (mid-tier) to compute current vs. 3-month average with variance metrics—requires multi-month aggregation and window functions for rolling averages, justifying mid-tier; (2) cross_recon (mid-tier) to classify anomalies against thresholds and generate posture assignments. Cross_recon handles the classification logic and reconciliation of computed metrics against governance bands (normal/concerning/critical). No policy_action needed because classification against numeric thresholds is part of cross_recon's reconciliation scope, not a distinct policy governance decision. No extra extract or mongo_query steps—all data originates from a single SQL warehouse.

output.sql: WITH monthly_spend AS (SELECT vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date)::DATE AS month, SUM(amount_usd) AS monthly_total FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '4 months' GROUP BY vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date)), current_month AS (SELECT vendor_name, monthly_total AS current_spend FROM monthly_spend WHERE month = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::DATE), three_month_avg AS (SELECT vendor_name, AVG(monthly_total) AS avg_3m_spend FROM monthly_spend WHERE month < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::DATE AND month >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::DATE - INTERVAL '3 months' GROUP BY vendor_name) SELECT cm.vendor_name, cm.current_spend, tma.avg_3m_spend, (cm.current_spend - tma.avg_3m_spend) AS variance, ROUND(((cm.current_spend - tma.avg_3m_spend) / tma.avg_3m_spend * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) AS pct_deviation, CASE WHEN ABS((cm.current_spend - tma.avg_3m_spend) / tma.avg_3m_spend) <= 0.10 THEN 'normal_variance' WHEN ABS((cm.current_spend - tma.avg_3m_spend) / tma.avg_3m_spend) <= 0.25 THEN 'concerning' ELSE 'critical' END AS anomaly_classification FROM current_month cm JOIN three_month_avg tma ON cm.vendor_name = tma.vendor_name ORDER BY pct_deviation DESC
